race.comment: NORTY FORTY (2) didn't measure up in G1 company last time out but will find this assignment much more to her liking. Grows a leg for hoop Yoshida who has three wins and a placing from just five steers and a return to the winners' stall would not surprise. LYNEHAM (1) is knocking on the door of another victory with consecutive runner-up finishes and gets some weight relief with the 1.5kg claim. Looms as the main danger. PINK VIXEN (4) should get a cosy run in transit from gate two and is a must for the exotics players. PIGGIETALES (8) is a last-start winner who shouldn't be underestimated.
